MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NASIR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR AUG-03-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON AUG-09-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON AUG-09-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

DEPT 7. T.MASON, JUDGE; G.ESPINOCILLA, CLERK; D.PADILLA, CSR 9:45 AM C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. PLTF, IN PRO PER, PRESENT. DEFT, IN PRO PER, NOT PRESENT. COURT TAKES JUDICIAL NOTICE OF TIME & PLACE SET FOR TRIAL. PRIMA FACIE CASE PRESENTED. ORAL & DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED. CASE SUBMITTED. JUDGMENT FOR PLTF & AGAINST DEFT. EXHIBIT IS RETURNED. PLTF TO PREPARE THE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SKINNER, DONALD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: BROADWAY HOTEL, 2048 POLK STREET, ROOM 2, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $936.24 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $936.24, LEASE FORFEITED
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
